programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Allie's lifestyle is ruined by the gumball-sized bump above her eye; Andrew's psoriasis and multiple body bumps have held him back from starting a family; Dr. Lyndsey assists Dr. Lee with Cristina's concerning shoulder lipoma.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In West Covina, Dusty uses magic to find his treasure; Lisa, determined to make her carpenter father proud, looks for something to refurbish and ends up channeling something else; Ivy wrestles with heels and tools, while Brandi gets in the ring to honor her grandpa.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers return to Moreno Valley, where an old friend surprises them; Dusty & Lupe do their best to hit it out of the park; Ivy finds a couple of "less scary" coffins; Brandi isn't going to let anything ruin her bright and sunny attitude.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Diamonds and Tigers and Bids... Oh My!
programme.desc: All the buyers are excited about the upscale potential of Rancho Palos Verdes, but it's Dave who finds his loot there; Brandi racks up a decent profit while saving herself from having to shell out for shelving; in Garden Grove, Kerri keeps Lisa focused long enough to weave a profit, while Kenny faces his fears in a new way.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Bathed in the heat of Moreno Valley, Kenny has difficulty with names, so he calls an audible; Brandi can't catch a break without some help from above; Dave gets stuck with the business end of an unsatisfying locker; Dusty and Lupe put their "street" smarts to good use.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Back to the Locker: Asian Artifacts
programme.desc: The bidders are stunned to discover that a cache of Asian antiques and artifacts could command prices as vast as the continent they came from.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Back in Montebello, Kenny is determined to stop swearing by carrying around a cuss counter; Dave goes in big on a high-end locker; Ivy doesn't hit the bullseye when it counts; Dusty and Lupe hope to hear the pristine sounds of success.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Revival
programme.desc: Willie nervously prepares to show off his golf skills at Tim Tebow's star-studded charity golf tournament. Meanwhile, Jacob and Bella put their energy into building their vintage clothing store, and Sadie gets ready for maternity leave by holding auditions to keep her Whoa That's Good podcast running strong.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny gets ganged up on in Riverside by the field of buyers; Dave buys an old unit and takes a voyage back in time; Ivy scores a locker that inspires him to go clubbing; Emily puts her foot down with a statement buy on a massive locker.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: The bidders are stunned to discover that a cache of Asian antiques and artifacts could command prices as vast as the continent they came from.

programme.title: Risk-Free Hearing Aid!
programme.desc: Call today to try the high quality, low-price Audien hearing aid, risk-free! No doctor or fittings necessary.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Overwhelmed with IRS Debt? Keys to Resolving Tax Debt
programme.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: For two decades, Undertaker and Shawn Michaels were the cornerstones of WWE; a roundtable of experts composed of Freddie Prinze Jr., Kevin Nash, Cody Rhodes, Beth Phoenix and John Bradshaw Layfield shed light on this notable battle.

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: Stephanie McMahon and Brie Bella's on-screen rivalry inspired a revolution in sports entertainment, showing that two women could be main event superstars and draw money, just as well as their male counterparts.

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: After a long run at WCW, Hulk Hogan returns to the WWE in 2002 and immediately engages in a confrontation with megastar The Rock, easily regarded as one the greatest spectacles in WWE history.

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: The Rock helped send WWE to new heights in the late 90s during the Attitude Era. But once Hollywood came calling, a bold and brash upstart named John Cena soon won over the entire WWE Universe and became the face of the company. However, Cena's public criticisms of The Rock led to verbal attacks both on and off the screen and eventually a dream match for WWE fans. Freddie Prinze Jr. breaks down this great rivalry with Kevin Nash, Natalya, Bayley and John Bradshaw Layfield.

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: Embarking on parallel paths to the top, The Rock and Triple H battle each other both in the ring and behind the scenes; Freddie Prinze Jr. and luminaries including Kevin Owens, Johnny Gargano and John "Bradshaw" Layfield break down this epic rivalry.

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: Cena and Edge relive their epic conflicts against one another; Freddie Prinze Jr. breaks down what made this rivalry all so memorable in a roundtable discussion with Kevin Nash, Cody Rhodes, Beth Phoenix and John Bradshaw Layfield.

programme.desc: The bidders travel to Tyler, Texas; Ricky is concerned by Victor's influence over Bubba; Jenny unearths a rare insect display; Moe needs Mary's help.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: Moe and Mary meet a qualified wood expert in the Texas town of Waxahachie; Ricky and Bubba find a strange weapon; a buyer listens to the locals to get an edge up on the competition.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The competition is stiff at a high-end storage facility; Dave and Jarrod find a unit containing a classic Jaguar; Brandi and Jarrod engage in a battle of the sexes.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: A torrential storm in Santa Cruz, Calif., leaves some buyers soaked; quilts brighten up Dave's rainy day.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Simi Valley, Calif., the buyers deal with safes, a pirate's booty and a vintage motorcycle; Dave is left with a broken heart.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Barry utilizes a little-known tactic to snatch up a locker, and it ties him up in knots; Brandi shops in the bargain basement but puts on quite a show in the process; Ivy lands a large unit, and the tools stack right up.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: All's Fair in Storage and Wars
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi look to score in Laguna Niguel, Calif.; Barry cuts the competition to pieces; a new buyer arrives on the scene.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: A locker in Whittier, Calif., features a high payoff; Dave eyes a unit with a stockpile of antiques; Barry's locker may contain old weapons.

programme.title: Stadium Lockup
programme.desc: Protecting the stadium are highly trained men and women from law enforcement, private security teams and medics; new members of the team blend with seasoned veterans as the staff faces multiple challenges.

programme.title: Stadium Lockup
programme.desc: Tensions are at an all-time high between these rivaling fans when a fight quickly erupts requiring multiple personnel to break it up.

programme.title: Stadium Lockup
programme.desc: The security team is on high alert during scorching temperatures in Cleveland and fans tailgating in the heat hours before kickoff; from medical emergencies to a vaping ejection that escalates, the teams face challenges at every turn.

programme.title: Stadium Lockup
programme.desc: Protecting the stadium are highly trained men and women from law enforcement, private security teams and medics; in this episode, the security team escorts defiant smokers from the stadium while on high alert.
